title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — Global — Q2 FY2026 (May – July 2026)
summary: International standard-setters are synchronizing Q3-Q4 2026 guidance releases across AML/CFT for DeFi (FATF), stablecoin oversight (FSB), and market conduct frameworks (IOSCO)—creating a 90-day window where multinational exchanges, banks, and regulators need compliance infrastructure before hard national implementation deadlines hit in 2027. This is the last quarter to position regulatory intelligence and baseline compliance tooling before budget freezes.
